warm_up:
Warm-up
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

metcon.name: Nancy
metcon.description:
5 Rounds for time of:  
400m Run  
15 Overhead Squats, 95# / 65#

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders and quads via snatches, OHS, and Nancy metcon; accessory work targets posterior chain and pulling.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Power Snatch, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Strength: Overhead Squat, 1 by 5 at 65 percent. Metcon: Nancy. Rounds for Time: 400m Run, 15 Overhead Squats, 95# / 65#. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, glutes.
